name: legal-analysis
description: Verification-first analysis of legal documents. Extracts text locally, decomposes the material into checkable theses anchored by character offsets, verifies every legal qualification as a three-slot syllogism against the primary source (statute + supreme-court guidance), and emits knowledge cards marked verified, candidate or unverifiable. Learns from corrections into a local store and accumulates a base of already-verified norms. Built for reviewing incoming work-product before it enters an accepted knowledge layer.

config_path.title: Path to the private profile config
config_path.description: Absolute path to a local legal-analysis.toml holding vault paths, target projects and house quality standards. Kept OUTSIDE this repository on purpose — this plugin is published publicly and must not carry private paths or proprietary methodology. If empty, the skill runs in generic mode and asks where to write results.
